product: Draft dashboards removed from Databricks One
tagline: Draft dashboards no longer displayed: Only published dashboards are now visible in Databricks One.
what_it_does: Draft dashboards no longer displayed: Only published dashboards are now visible in Databricks One. This change ensures business users see finalized content that is relevant and reliable for their workflows.
why_it_matters: Reduces operational overhead and unlocks new capabilities for data teams on Databricks.
plain_summary: Draft dashboards no longer displayed: Only published dashboards are now visible in Databricks One. This change ensures business users see finalized content that is relevant and reliable for their workflows.
key_takeaway: Draft dashboards no longer displayed: Only published dashboards are now visible in Databricks One.
